text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family attached tri-level designed zero lot line. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by General Electric Rd, to the South by Empire St, to the East by Airport Rd, and to the West by Veterans Pkwy.
